mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_EDU_START.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_EDU_START(ID, EDU_START_AT, USER_ID, EDU_ID, EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED, EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT, EDU_START_COMPLETED_COUNT, EDU_START_CORRECT_COUNT) VALUES(#{id}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{userId}, #{eduId}, 0, #{eduStartTotalCount}, #{eduStartCompletedCount}, #{eduStartCorrectCount})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, EDU_START_AT, USER_ID, EDU_ID, EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED, EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT, EDU_START_COMPLETED_COUNT, EDU_START_CORRECT_COUNT, EDU_START_TIME, EDU_START_COMPLETED_AT FROM ( SELECT ID, EDU_START_AT, USER_ID, EDU_ID, EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED, EDU_START_TOTAL_COUNT, EDU_START_COMPLETED_COUNT, EDU_START_CORRECT_COUNT, EDU_START_TIME, EDU_START_COMPLETED_AT FROM TBL_EDU_START WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND EDU_ID = #{eduId} AND EDU_START_IS_COMPLETED = 1 ORDER BY EDU_START_COMPLETED_AT DESC, ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
